description:
Are you tired of typing the same commands over and over again? 😫 In this video, we dive deep into Lazy Script (lscript), an incredible automation framework for Kali Linux that streamlines your penetration testing workflow. Whether you are a beginner or a pro, this tool allows you to install, manage, and launch over 50+ top-tier hacking tools with just a few keystrokes. ⚡

⚠️ DISCLAIMER: I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR HOW YOU USE THIS TOOL. This video is strictly for educational purposes and for use on your own networks or systems where you have explicit written permission. BE LEGAL AND NOT STUPID. 🛡️

🔗 Links & Resources:
🌐 Website: https://ethicalexplorers.github.io/
📥 GitHub Link: https://github.com/arismelachroinos/lscript
